directive.title: Dashboard performance budget assertion and instrumentation

auditor.summary: The implementation successfully instruments the W251 BOP platform with server-side timing headers, client-side navigation timing, and a performance health endpoint. The fire-and-forget audit logging pattern is correctly implemented with void prefix and error catching. However, several critical acceptance criteria are not fully verified: the non-blocking audit log behavior has no test, the degraded status logic has no unit test, and the SSR safety of the navigation timing hook is untested. Additionally, converting the dashboard page to a Client Component may have unintended side effects. The build is recoverable with additional tests and minor fixes.

top_issues.description: Missing test for non-blocking audit log behavior (criterion 7) - no mock of prisma.audit_logs.create with artificial delay
Missing test for degraded status when db_ms > 200 (criterion 4) - no unit test or mock verifying the logic
Missing SSR safety test for useNavigationTiming hook (criterion 9) - no test rendering in Node.js environment without window
